pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py path checks
Python XML parsing of the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf file downloaded from the master branch shows the September 2011 Yellow House trip contains exactly 6 dives (dives 85-90).
Python XML parsing confirms the dives in the September 2011 Yellow House trip have dates starting with 2011-09 (specifically 2011-09-29 and 2011-09-30).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting all dives from the September 2011 Yellow House trip to '/home/ga/Documents/yellow_house.ssrf'. Analysis of the official real Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf file confirms the dives have the expected '2011-09' date prefix. However, contrary to the metadata's claim of 4 dives, the target trip actually contains exactly 6 dives.
